meaning: vt.使发生联系,使联合vi.交往,结交n.合作人,同事adj.副的
examples: Mr. Lin is associate director of the Institute.
She didn't want to associate with the likes of me.
He will remain affiliated with the firm as a special associate director.
Mr. ROBERT GEORGE (Associate Editor, Editorial Page, the New York Post): Glad to be here.
Dr Victoria Coker is currently a post-doctoral research associate at the University of Manchester.
